Legal

Shipping & Delivery Policy (Digital Services)

Effective date: 07 May 2026

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED (“Vorynex”, “we”, “us”) provides digital services and SaaS subscriptions. We do not ship physical goods. This policy explains how digital access and deliverables are provided after purchase.

1) Delivery method

Delivery is performed electronically through one or more of the following: (a) account activation; (b) access credentials; (c) enabling of subscription features; (d) email confirmation with service access instructions; or (e) digital provisioning of agreed deliverables.

2) Delivery timelines

  • - Standard digital access is typically enabled immediately upon successful payment confirmation.
  • - In some cases, activation may require verification or manual review for security/compliance reasons; this may take up to 1–2 business days.
  • - Enterprise/professional services (if contracted) follow the delivery schedule agreed in the applicable statement of work or order form.

3) Delivery confirmation

Delivery is considered complete when access is made available to the registered account or when we send confirmation to your registered email address with access instructions or deliverable links.

4) Customer responsibilities

  • - Provide accurate contact and account details at checkout/registration.
  • - Ensure you can receive emails from @vorynex.in domains (check spam/quarantine policies).
  • - Maintain compatible devices, software, and internet connectivity.

5) Issues with delivery

If you do not receive access or face provisioning issues, contact support@vorynex.in with your order/invoice ID and registered email. We will investigate and assist. Refund eligibility (if applicable) is governed by our Refund & Cancellation Policy.

6) No physical shipping

As we provide digital services, there are no shipping charges, physical delivery timelines, or courier logistics involved.

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED

Enterprise-grade SaaS and online software services from India.
